Name: Flat (No Coordination)
Notes: No coordination overhead but no failure recovery

Name: One-Level (Star Topology)
Notes: Optimal for small systems - fastest recovery

Name: Two-Level (Tree Topology)
Notes: Best balance - fault isolation at group level

Name: Three-Level (Mesh Topology)
Notes: Good for medium systems - distributed recovery

Name: Four-Level (Full Mesh)
Notes: Best resilience - acceptable overhead for scale
